score_breakdown.note: Mix EXACT/PHRASE/BROAD du; CTR Search network 13.7% > 5%
15 search term spend ~1,428,610d/30d, 0 conv, chua add negative (>10 item)
RSA headline text khong expose; format chi tach DISPLAY_BANNER vs OTHER
worst_performing_banners & money_pit_ads rong; chi 320x50.gif CTR 0.28% can review
15 placement GDN lottery/news CTR <0.5% dot ~1,335,377d/30d (chua exclude)
Windsor chua xuat impression_share — can fetch de cham
ROAS 2.7x — duoi target 3x mot chut (2-3x band)
Phan lon category flat/+nhe (CAM_4G +7%, MAYDO +5%); CHONG_GHI_AM -18.6%; khong co spike

headline: ROAS 2.7x sat target — cat GDN rac, dồn budget sang Search CTR cao
verdict: ROAS 2.7x sat target 3x (chi 64tr ra 172tr revenue Website, 75 don). Search rat khoe (CTR 13-18%) nhung GDN CONTENT an ~nua spend voi CTR 1.26% va 15 term ~1.4tr chua add negative. Co hoi ro: cat ~2.8tr GDN rac + negative gap, dồn sang 3 Search campaign CTR cao dang underspend (TB Dò Nghe Lén 18.3%, TB Chống Ghi Âm 16.7%, Cam mini).

top_actions.action: Add negative 'camera năng lượng mặt trời' (+ 'camera nlmt sim 4g', 'cameras') vào camp 'Search - Cam mini' & 'Search - Sim 4G'
top_actions.reason: Spend 191,566d/30d, 0 conv, match BROAD, status NONE. Cam mini/Sim 4G ban camera wifi/4G — khong ban tam NLMT.

top_actions.action: Review/A-B banner 320x50.gif (ad_id 752128818630) camp 'RMK - chống ghi âm'
top_actions.reason: CTR 0.28% vs 300x250.gif 1.07% & 300x600.gif 1.12% cung camp. Spend 207k/30d hieu qua thap nhat.
CPC 7d tang +31.4% (5.5k->7.3k) ma clicks/conv khong tang — bid war dot tien.

top_actions.action: Exclude 15 placement GDN lottery/news (xsmn.mobi, dantri.com.vn, www.24h.com.vn, giavang.org, phatnguoi.com...)
top_actions.reason: CTR <0.5%, audience sai. Tong spend ~1,335,377d/30d tren GDN CONTENT (CTR network 1.26% vs Search 13.65%).

top_actions.action: Tang budget camp 'Search - TB Dò Nghe Lén' +25% (dồn tu placement cut)
top_actions.reason: CTR 18.3% cao nhat account, spend chi 3.29tr/30d — underspend tren keyword chat luong cao.

budget_reallocation.headline: Cat ~2,763,987d tu GDN rac + negative gap, dồn sang 3 Search campaign CTR cao dang underspend.

increase.reason: CTR 18.3% cao nhat account, spend chi 3.29tr/30d — dang bo lo demand. Tang +25% de capture them click chat luong.
CTR 16.7% + CPC re nhat (3.4k) nhung spend thap nhat (1.22tr) va trend -12%. Re ma hieu qua — tang +30%.
Serve term 'camera' (14 conv — top converter) + 'camera ip' (5 conv); CTR trend +41% tuan qua. Tang +15% nhung canh CPC 7.7k dang cao.

reactivate.note: CTR 13.6% nhung spend_7d = 0 (da tat ~7 ngay). Co conv tu 'thiet bi dinh vi xe may'. Verify ly do tat — neu vo tinh thi bat lai.

decrease.what: 15 GDN placement lottery/news (xsmn.mobi, dantri, 24h, giavang, phatnguoi...)
decrease.reason: CTR <0.5% — audience xem xo so/tu vi/bong da, khong phai khach mua thiet bi. Exclude toan bo.
Spend ~0 conv, chua add negative — gom brand doi thu (imou/fpt), tu sai intent (NLMT, nghe len).
CPC 7d +31% (5.5k->7.3k) ma khong them conv — cap max CPC de chan bid war.
